context:
Evaluating a Coralogix support response for this user question:

How do I configure the OpenTelemetry Collector to batch spans before sending to Coralogix?

checklist.name: no-if-it-attempts-to-answer-the-collector-con
checklist.description: Redirects the user to the opentelemetry-collector skill — this is a collector configuration question, not an SDK instrumentation question. FAIL if it attempts to answer the collector config question directly without noting the scope boundary.
